The '''''Caravel''''' was the personal starship of [[Mungo Baobab]]. Following Mungo's capture in [[Cloak of the Sith/Legends|The Cloak of the Sith]], ''Caravel'' was briefly captured by [[Roon/Legends|Roon's]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Bisad Koong|Koong]] before eventually being returned to its owner.

{{Ship-stub}}
